name: step-08-full-global-validation
title: Run Step 08 full-global validation
description: Execute Step 08 (validate gridded products against ship cells) on the full 2,394,115-cell global validation set. Currently only the 8,121-cell T1 footprint has been validated. Estimated runtime ~3.5-4h, output ~0.6-1.3 GB.
